storylets.title: {=home_brood_empty_cot_title}In the empty cot
storylets.setup: {=home_brood_empty_cot_setup}Seoras had the cot next to yours since Pravend. His kit is still folded at the foot, the way he liked it — the boots turned just so. You sit with it in the dark a while.

options.text: {=home_brood_empty_cot_opt_take}Take the boots. He'd want someone to use them.
{=home_brood_empty_cot_opt_keep}Keep the kit as it is. Someone should know him still.
{=home_brood_empty_cot_opt_write}Write his name in the book no one asked you to keep.

storylets.title: {=home_unwind_dice_title}The dice come out
storylets.setup: {=home_unwind_dice_setup}Someone produces a pair of knucklebones and a flat stone. A small ring forms. A sergeant winks at you from the far side.

options.text: {=home_unwind_dice_opt_win}Play. Feel the luck in your palm tonight.
{=home_unwind_dice_opt_lose}Play. You'll win some back tomorrow.
{=home_unwind_dice_opt_walk}Shake your head. Keep your coin.

storylets.title: {=home_unwind_song_title}Someone starts a song
storylets.setup: {=home_unwind_song_setup}A low voice starts up near the fire — an old campaign tune, not quite remembered right. Others drift in. The words matter less than the sound.

options.text: {=home_unwind_song_opt_sing}Pick up the next verse. You know this one.
options.tooltip: {=home_unwind_song_opt_sing_tt}Sets a social flag with the company.

options.text: {=home_unwind_song_opt_listen}Stay back. Let them have it.

storylets.title: {=home_unwind_sergeant_title}The sergeant's flask
storylets.setup: {=home_unwind_sergeant_setup}Sergeant Burec pulls you aside. The column did well today — he feels it. He uncorks a flask and offers it without explanation.

options.text: {=home_unwind_sergeant_opt_drink}Take it. You've earned the hour.
{=home_unwind_sergeant_opt_decline}Decline. Keep your edge for tomorrow.

storylets.title: {=home_unwind_firelit_title}Long into the fire
storylets.setup: {=home_unwind_firelit_setup}Cold sets in early tonight. The fire is generous and someone has dragged a log close. Stories drift out — nothing you'll remember exactly, but true in the feeling.

options.text: {=home_unwind_firelit_opt_stay}Stay late. Let the cold wait.
options.tooltip: {=home_unwind_firelit_opt_stay_tt}Sets a flag; roots you in the company.

options.text: {=home_unwind_firelit_opt_early}Turn in. Rest is its own discipline.

storylets.title: {=home_unwind_stars_title}The sky tonight
storylets.setup: {=home_unwind_stars_setup}You step outside the billet for a breath. The stars are out and the camp is quiet enough to hear them, almost. It's the kind of night that invites thinking, if you let it.

options.text: {=home_unwind_stars_opt_reflect}Stay out. Think through what brought you here.
options.tooltip: {=home_unwind_stars_opt_reflect_tt}Sets a stargazer flag; quiet character note.

options.text: {=home_unwind_stars_opt_pass}Go back inside. Stars keep no promises.

storylets.title: {=home_train_sparring_title}A partner in the yard
storylets.setup: {=home_train_sparring_setup}Dervyn has been at the practice post since supper, working a pattern you don't recognise. He sees you watching and raises his wooden blade — invitation or challenge, hard to say.

options.text: {=home_train_sparring_opt_spar}Spar. Work until you can't see the edge.
{=home_train_sparring_opt_bet}Bet five rounds. Loser buys supper.

storylets.title: {=home_train_drill_title}Running the grounds
storylets.setup: {=home_train_drill_setup}The camp has a circuit — wall to well to stable-gate and back. You've seen the veterans run it twice before lights. Tonight you have no excuse not to join them.

options.text: {=home_train_drill_opt_drill}Run the circuit until your shins complain.
{=home_train_drill_opt_skip}Leave it for morning. Tonight belongs to rest.

storylets.title: {=home_train_master_title}A weapons-master in the market
storylets.setup: {=home_train_master_setup}Word passed at midday: an old Vakken swordsman is taking pupils in the lower quarter, two-handed blade forms he won't teach for free. The evening is still young enough to find him.

options.text: {=home_train_master_opt_seek}Find him. Pay what he asks.
{=home_train_master_opt_defer}Leave it. You'll find your own way.

storylets.title: {=home_train_armor_title}Kit in front of you
storylets.setup: {=home_train_armor_setup}Your mail has gone rough where it took the last blow. You pull a hauberk into your lap, oil-rag in hand, and start working through the rings one at a time. It takes what it takes.

options.text: {=home_train_armor_opt_condition}Work through every link. Don't stop short.
{=home_train_armor_opt_enough}Good enough for now. Set it aside.

storylets.title: {=home_train_foreign_title}A different way of holding the shaft
storylets.setup: {=home_train_foreign_setup}One of the Aserai auxiliaries steps through a polearm form you've never seen — both hands low, weight on the back foot. He notices your stare and gestures: try it, or don't.

options.text: {=home_train_foreign_opt_learn}Try it until the grip stops feeling wrong.
{=home_train_foreign_opt_laugh}Beg off. Stick to what your hands know.

storylets.title: {=home_brood_lord_father_title}The way he said it
storylets.setup: {=home_brood_lord_father_setup}You've been turning over something your lord said to the column today — the phrasing, the patience in it. Your father used to speak the same way. You're not sure what to do with that.

options.text: {=home_brood_lord_father_opt_confide}Find him. Say what you're carrying.
{=home_brood_lord_father_opt_silent}Keep it. Some things don't need saying.

storylets.title: {=home_brood_letter_title}The letter you haven't written
storylets.setup: {=home_brood_letter_setup}Paper and ink have been available for three days. You've thought about it every one of them — what to say, what to leave out, how to sound like you mean it.

options.text: {=home_brood_letter_opt_send}Write it and give it to the courier.
{=home_brood_letter_opt_burn}Write it and burn it. Enough to have said it.
{=home_brood_letter_opt_skip}Leave the page blank. Not tonight.

storylets.title: {=home_brood_cold_comfort_title}The weight of a bad run
storylets.setup: {=home_brood_cold_comfort_setup}Three hard weeks. Supplies thin, weather worse, the men quiet in the wrong way. You lie on your billet staring at the ceiling and feel the whole thing pressing on your chest.

options.text: {=home_brood_cold_comfort_opt_steel}Steel yourself. This is the work. You knew it.
options.tooltip: {=home_brood_cold_comfort_opt_steel_tt}Sets inured flag; marks you as steadfast.

options.text: {=home_brood_cold_comfort_opt_doubt}Let the doubt in. At least it's honest.

storylets.title: {=home_brood_drift_title}Nothing in particular
storylets.setup: {=home_brood_drift_setup}You can't settle. Not restless enough to act, not tired enough to sleep. The evening moves past you like smoke. This is what peace feels like in a soldier's life, apparently.

options.text: {=home_brood_drift_opt_pass}The night passes.

storylets.title: {=home_commune_lord_hearth_title}Your lord at the fire
storylets.setup: {=home_commune_lord_hearth_setup}You find your lord alone at the great hearth, a cup in hand, not reading. He looks up without surprise — as if he half-expected someone. The evening is long enough to fill with words or silence.

options.text: {=home_commune_lord_hearth_opt_speak}Speak plainly. Tell him what you've seen.
{=home_commune_lord_hearth_opt_listen}Sit and listen. Let him talk if he needs to.

storylets.title: {=home_commune_confession_title}What Aldric said
storylets.setup: {=home_commune_confession_setup}Aldric finds you after supper, pulls you back from the others. He tells you something in a low voice — something that would matter to a sergeant if it reached one. He trusts you to know what to do with it.

options.text: {=home_commune_confession_opt_keep}Keep it. It's not yours to pass on.
{=home_commune_confession_opt_report}Report it. Better out than a slow rot.

storylets.title: {=home_commune_family_meal_title}An invitation to the high table
storylets.setup: {=home_commune_family_meal_setup}A steward delivers word: your lord and his lady are taking their evening meal and ask for a few soldiers to join. It's informal — unusual. The hall will be warm.

options.text: {=home_commune_family_meal_opt_share}Go. Eat at their table and mean it.
{=home_commune_family_meal_opt_decline}Send polite word. Their evening is their own.

storylets.title: {=home_commune_chaplain_title}The chaplain's hour
storylets.setup: {=home_commune_chaplain_setup}The garrison chaplain holds an open door after evening prayer — not for doctrine, just to hear. A few men stand outside unsure whether to go in. You've carried a thing or two yourself.

options.text: {=home_commune_chaplain_opt_confess}Go in. Put it down somewhere.
{=home_commune_chaplain_opt_evade}Walk past. You'll manage it yourself.

storylets.title: {=home_commune_old_soldier_title}The old hand talks
storylets.setup: {=home_commune_old_soldier_setup}Mira has been in five campaigns, three lords, two wars she doesn't name. She sits outside the billet after supper and talks if you sit near enough. Most of it sounds like complaint. None of it is.

options.text: {=home_commune_old_soldier_opt_listen}Sit down and stay until she stops.
options.tooltip: {=home_commune_old_soldier_opt_listen_tt}+rank XP; absorb what she's paid to know.

options.text: {=home_commune_old_soldier_opt_cut}Nod and excuse yourself early.

storylets.title: {=home_scheme_skim_stores_title}The quartermaster's back is turned
storylets.setup: {=home_scheme_skim_stores_setup}Resupply came in sloppy tonight. The quartermaster's count is off and he knows it — but he's moved on to the next crate. There's coin in the gap between what was logged and what arrived.

options.text: {=home_scheme_skim_stores_opt_take}Take a small cut. Nothing that shows.
options.tooltip: {=home_scheme_skim_stores_opt_take_tt}+50 gold. Scrutiny up. Risk of audit chain.

options.text: {=home_scheme_skim_stores_opt_leave}Leave it. It's not worth the headache.

storylets.title: {=home_scheme_eavesdrop_hall_title}Voices from the council room
storylets.setup: {=home_scheme_eavesdrop_hall_setup}The door to the inner chamber sits ajar and the voices inside are not being careful. You catch a name, a sum, a direction. It would be easy to know more.

options.text: {=home_scheme_eavesdrop_hall_opt_listen}Press close to the wall. Learn what you can.
{=home_scheme_eavesdrop_hall_opt_walk}Walk away. That knowledge has a price.

storylets.title: {=home_scheme_bribe_gate_title}A word with the gate guard
storylets.setup: {=home_scheme_bribe_gate_setup}The night guard has a reputation for flexibility and a hand that opens like a book if you put the right coin in it. Getting out after curfew has its uses — you've been thinking about one.

options.text: {=home_scheme_bribe_gate_opt_pay}Pay thirty. Make the arrangement.
{=home_scheme_bribe_gate_opt_refuse}Leave him. Find another way.

storylets.title: {=home_scheme_tavern_rumors_title}The tavern knows things
storylets.setup: {=home_scheme_tavern_rumors_setup}You slip into the lower tavern for an hour. Three conversations are running at once and none of them quiet. News moves through here before it moves anywhere else — if you can sort signal from noise.

options.text: {=home_scheme_tavern_rumors_opt_listen}Drink and listen. Pick out what's worth keeping.
{=home_scheme_tavern_rumors_opt_leave}Finish your cup and go.
{=home_scheme_tavern_rumors_opt_spread}Add something. See how far it travels.

storylets.title: {=home_scheme_ghost_sentry_title}The gap in the patrol
storylets.setup: {=home_scheme_ghost_sentry_setup}You've been watching the guard rotation for three evenings. There's a gap — two minutes at the east passage, regular as hunger. Whatever it is you need out there, tonight is the night to move.

options.text: {=home_scheme_ghost_sentry_opt_slip}Use the gap. Move quick, stay low.
{=home_scheme_ghost_sentry_opt_stay}Stay put. The risk isn't worth it tonight.
